description: A local charity has pledged to pay $200 towards a low-income customer's past-due utility bill.

nodes.task_description: Receive the payment pledge from the charity agency.

expected_outcome.value: Agent receives the pledge details, including customer name, account number, and amount.

nodes.task_description: Verify the customer account and the past-due balance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the account details are correct.

nodes.task_description: Apply the pledged amount as a credit to the customer's account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully posts the credit, reducing the customer's balance due.
